Chapter 8 – British Columbia

British Columbia provincial tax

Table – British Columbia provincial tax rates
Annual net income (A) ($) Provincial tax rate (R) Annual constant (K) ($)
0.00 to 45,654.00 5.06% 0.00
45,654.01 to 91,310.00 7.70% 1,209.00
More than 91,310.00 10.50% 3,763.00
Table 8.11 British Columbia claim codes
Claim code Total claim amount ($) from Total claim amount ($) to Option 1, TCP ($) Option 1, K1P ($)
0 No claim amount No claim amount 0.00 0.00
1 0.00 13,216.00 13,216.00 668.73
2 13,216.01 16,190.00 14,703.00 743.97
3 16,190.01 19,165.00 16,190.00 819.21
